description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master (excluding tags starting with v), and pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: e2e-tests and rust-tests, both running on ubuntu-latest with a defi/ain-builder:latest container. e2e-tests checks out code, populates environment, installs dependencies, builds, and runs end-to-end tests. rust-tests checks out code, populates environment, sets up dependencies, builds, and runs Rust tests.
